content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks can be substantially improved by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision. This structured combination turns the single feedback loop of vanilla Self-Refine into a multi-view criticism process that catches blind spots a single self-feedback perspective would miss.
